title: allionia gladewitzii
intro: Allionia gladewitzii is a flowering plant species in the family Nyctaginaceae, commonly known as the Four O'Clocks due to the timing of its blooming. The plant's medicinal properties include its ability to act as a diuretic, helping to reduce inflammation and alleviate symptoms associated with urinary tract infections. The health benefits of Allionia gladewitzii include its potential to lower blood pressure, reduce fever, and exhibit antimicrobial properties, making it a valuable remedy for various health issues. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, and is often used in traditional medicine to treat a range of ailments.
